---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Install skillforge `pip install skillforge==X.Y.Z`
2. Create a skill `skillforge skill create test`
3. Run `skillforge skill run test -i message="hello"`
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Logs / Screenshots

If applicable, add logs or screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 14.5]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.12.3]
- SkillForge version: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- Installation method: [pip, from source]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
